listening.title: Listening: Weather right now
listening.transcript: Look, it is raining now. The wind is blowing hard. The sun is shining behind the clouds.

questions.question: What is happening right now?
questions.explanation: "it is raining now... The wind is blowing hard."

listening.title: Listening: Market changes
listening.transcript: Prices are increasing this month. Fruit prices are growing fast. The market is expanding every year.
